name: codex-email-rules-extension
description: Enterprise extension modules for customer email review, SMTP auto-send, and ERP integration

scripts.check: node --check src/config/env.js && node --check src/modules/mailer/smtpClient.js && node --check src/modules/mailer/sendService.js && node --check src/modules/erp/erpClient.js && node --check src/modules/erp/mappers.js && node --check src/modules/erp/retryQueue.js && node --check src/modules/workflow/reviewSyncService.js && node --check src/examples/integrationExample.js
